programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Shepherds Around The World
programme.desc: People Mark Michel and his team embark on a global journey, immersing themselves in the lives of five diverse pastoral communities to explore their unique cultures, challenges, and enduring traditions.

programme.title: Four Seasons In The Forests
programme.desc: Nature Different creatures interact with nature; some appear and others hide each season, providing variety in the forest.

programme.title: The Battle For Survival In The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Nature Despite the dangers and threats to which marine creatures are exposed daily in the Mediterranean Sea due to factory and farm waste, these creatures struggle to survive through adaptation and biological evolution.

programme.title: In Love With Wild Horses
programme.desc: People An amazing journey through the enchanting nature of the North American continent, home to the Tsoulcotine people, known as the horse people because of their timeless and unique bond with horses.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: Arabic Radio
programme.desc: History.

programme.title: The Diabetes Battle In Australia
programme.desc: Fitness & Health An Australian physician and a physiologist are revolutionizing the world of diseases by presenting a scientifically based diet that can eliminate type 2 diabetes.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Modern Science
programme.desc: Sciences Despite the progressive scientific developments in many fields, science remains baffled by unexpected cosmic phenomena such as solar storms. Research into many mysteries continues, but science must be prepared to deal with the discoveries' consequences.

programme.title: Protecting Sondong Cave
programme.desc: Nature A journey into the heart of Phong Nha-Ke Bang cave, located in northern Vietnam and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. This cave, the largest in the world, is an extraordinary marvel, featuring a lake, forest, clouds, and a rare ecosystem.

programme.title: Secrets Of Mount Olympus
programme.desc: Nature An exciting and enjoyable exploratory adventure in one of the strangest places in the world: Mount Olympus, once the home of the gods in Greek mythology. Now, scientists are working tirelessly to understand its strange phenomena.

programme.title: Santorini's Mystery
programme.desc: Nature Researchers from around the globe embark on a high-stakes mission to investigate the volatile volcano of Santorini, plunging beneath the sea to gather evidence and unravel questions that have intrigued historians and scientists for decades.

programme.title: Cheese From The Heart Of Nature
programme.desc: Nature Cheese makers strive to preserve the traditional flavor threatened by modern industry, passing down their age-old secrets through generations, believing that authentic taste is crafted by patient, loving hands, not machines.

programme.title: A Mosque's Story
programme.desc: History We travel through the mosques of the world to learn their untold stories, contemplate their designs and decorations, and explore through them the cultural and social transformations that they have witnessed over time.

programme.title: Crescent In The Face Of Nazism
programme.desc: History During the Nazi invasion of France, hundreds of Jews found refuge in the Grand Mosque of Paris and other Islamic institutions, where Muslims bravely risked their lives to shield them from capture and death.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.title: The Impossible Journey
programme.desc: Nature In the heart of the icy wilderness, 28 brave adventurers battle for survival after being stranded. Tim Jarvis revives their impossible journey in a legendary challenge.

programme.title: Tahtaci People.. Children Of Forest
programme.desc: Nature In the Aegean forests in southern Turkey, a strange sect of loggers performs special rituals when cutting trees in season, where they pray and offer sacrifices because they believe that each tree has its own spirit.

programme.title: Secrets Deep In The Ice
programme.desc: Nature Scientists embark on a journey to the coldest and most frozen places, where they uncover mummified bodies, lost treasures, and mysterious viruses beneath layers of ice, using state-of-the-art tools and technologies that give us glimpses into the past.

programme.title: Ek Main Aurr Ek Tu
programme.desc: Rahul meets with Riana in her most desperate moments after she broke up with her boyfriend. They drink a lot and the next day when they wake they discover that they got married. But they fall in love with each others. Kareena Kapoor, Imran Khan, Boman Irani, Shakun Batra, Shakun Batra, Ayesha DeVitre.

programme.title: De De Pierre De
programme.desc: A man in his midlife crises faces opposition from his family and ex-wife when he decides to marry a girl at his son's age. Akiv Ali, Surabhi Bhatnagar, Tarun Jain, Ajay Devgn, Tabu , Rakul Preet Singh.

programme.title: Rocky Aur Rani Ki Prem Kahani
programme.desc: Love blossoms between Punjabi Rocky and Bengali Rani despite their contrasting personalities. In a bid to win over their skeptical families, they make an exceptional decision before getting married. Ranveer Singh, Alia Bhatt, Dharmendra Singh Deol, Jaya Bachchan, Shabana Azmi, Karan Johar, Shashank Khaitan, Sumit Roy.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Chulbul is fighting for revealing the ugly truth of the evil idiot, Baccha Bhaiyaa who is now a politician and a strong rival in the upcoming elections. Sonakshi Sinha, Salman Khan, Prakash Raj, Vinod Khanna, Arbaaz Khan, Dilip Shukla, Arbaaz Khan.

programme.title: Gumraah
programme.desc: While searching for the father she has never known, a female singer is imprisoned for drug trafficking and unexpectedly finds support from a criminal whose love she has consistently turned down. Mahesh Bhatt, Sanjay Dutt, Sridevi , Anupam Kher, Robin Bhatt, Sujit Sen, Sridevi.

programme.title: Teri Baaton Mein Aisa Uljha Jiya
programme.desc: In his quest for the perfect life partner, Aryan crossed paths with Sifra while on official duty in the United States. What began as a magical connection soon turns bittersweet when he realizes their love is bound by impossibility. Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Dharmendra Singh Deol, Dimple Kapadia, Rakesh Bedi, Rajesh Kumar, Amit Joshi, Aradhana Sah, Amit Joshi, Aradhana Sah.

programme.title: Sarfira
programme.desc: A man with unshakable resolve sets out to build an airline that puts travel within everyone's reach, but the real turbulence comes before liftoff, rivals who will stop at nothing to make sure his dream never leaves the ground. Sudha Kongara.

programme.title: Sarfira
programme.desc: A man with unshakable resolve sets out to build an airline that puts travel within everyone's reach, but the real turbulence comes before liftoff, rivals who will stop at nothing to make sure his dream never leaves the ground. Sudha Kongara.

programme.title: The Game: Champions League
programme.desc: With Wassim taking the grand prize, the competition takes an exciting turn. Mazou gathers his energy and determination to bounce back, rebuild his reputation, and show everyone what he's really made of after a tough loss. Hesham Maged, Chico, May Kassab, Mirna Gamil, Ahmed Fathy, Mohammed Tharwat, Moataz Al Tony, Ahmed Saad Wali.

programme.title: My Aunt Qamasha
programme.desc: A controlling mother's secret surveillance of her adult children and their spouses shatters her family's trust when one daughter-in-law stumbles upon the hidden cameras, forcing everyone to confront the suffocating grip of her so-called love. Hayat Al Fahad, Soaad Al Abd Allah.

programme.title: My Aunt Qamasha
programme.desc: A controlling mother's secret surveillance of her adult children and their spouses shatters her family's trust when one daughter-in-law stumbles upon the hidden cameras, forcing everyone to confront the suffocating grip of her so-called love. Hayat Al Fahad, Soaad Al Abd Allah.

programme.title: Stiletto
programme.desc: A police officer investigates a murder that occurred at a party. During the investigations, he discovers many secrets related to everyone attended it. Karess Bashar, Dima Kandalaft, Nada Abou Farhaat, Rita Harb, Qays Sheikh Najib, Ender Emir, Lobna Meshlah, Mai Hayek.

programme.title: Complex 75
programme.desc: Relationships become intertwined between five families who live inside one of the upscale residential complexes in the city of Riyadh, and their dreams and ambitions control them, which may cause them problems. Tamer Bsyony, Ghada Al Molla, Abd El Monaem Riyad, Ingy Salama, Sarah El Harbi, Nada Ibrahim, Rana Gobran, Ghada Al Mulla, Rana Jobran.

programme.title: Lost In Someone's Love
programme.desc: Sai Joshi dreams of joining the Nagpur Medical College and becoming a doctor one day, but her steps are hindered when her family forces her to marry an IPS officer who is in love with another woman, so they make a secret deal that comforts both of them. Ayesha Singh, Neil Bhatt, Aishwarya Sharma Bhatt, Sanjivani Amit Takkar, Kishori Shahane, Jaydeep Sen, Rajesh Chawla.

programme.title: Al Aghar
programme.desc: Despite his changed identity, Youssef is still haunted by the murder of his mother, which drives him to seek out the killer and exact revenge no matter how long it takes. Amr Saad, Dorra Zarrouk, Said Ragab, khaled zaki, Nahed Al Sibaay, Sara Salama, Yasser Samy, Ahmed Halaba, Mohamed Fawzy, Dorra Zarrouq.

programme.title: The Pit
programme.desc: Despite leaving his love behind and starting fresh, the surprising presence of Yamac's mother disturbs all of his feelings asking him to return and aid the family legacy. Aras Bulut Iynemli, Erkan Kolcak Kostendil.

programme.title: Wild Bees
programme.desc: Following their father's death, three daughters stand up to the richest and most powerful man in their village, who is trying to buy their land. Despite their desperate attempts to resist him, their eldest sister is forced to marry his son. Maria Kitsou, Elli Tringou.

programme.desc: Following their father's death, three daughters stand up to the richest and most powerful man in their village, who is trying to buy their land. Despite their desperate attempts to resist him, their eldest sister is forced to marry his son. Maria Kitsou, Elli Tringou.

programme.title: Retaliation
programme.desc: Following a group of people whose lives change for the worse upon exposing to a terrible event on an unexpectedly ominous day. Hossein Dashti, Abdullah Boushahri, Mahmoud Boushahri, Osama Al Mezeal, Areej Attar, Salma Salem, Shahd Elkhataab, Fatima Al-Busairi, Nour Al-Badri, Abdullah Boushehri, Mahmoud Boushehri.

programme.title: Poisoned Honey
programme.desc: In a peaceful family setting, Fouad's home brims with warmth and unity. However, when faced with adversity, tensions mount, testing the family's bonds and revealing their readiness to make sacrifices. Dhoul Faqar Khedr, Seba Ibrahim, Bakr Khalid, Hend Nezar, Zohour Alaa, Fady Selim, Nada Emad Khalil, Zul Feqar Khedr, Saba Ibrahem.

programme.title: My Family Wins
programme.desc: In each episode, Jawad Al Shakarchi hosts two families competing to answer a series of general knowledge questions to win the grand prize of ten million Iraqi dinars. Jawad Al Shakraji, Fadi Hadad, Haider Nashi, Jawad Al Shakarchi, Fadi Haddad, Jawad Al Shakarji.

programme.title: Badeaa's Children
programme.desc: Follows Badeaa, a determined mother, who leads her children through a tumultuous journey towards a brighter tomorrow, as they confront myriad challenges together. Solafah Memar, Samer Ismail, Mahmoud Nasr, Nadine Tahseeine bek, Nadine Khory, Yamen Hajli, Rasha Sharbtgy, Ali Wajeeh, Sulafa Memar.

programme.title: Al King
programme.desc: Once a clean boxer, Hamza is pulled into a ruthless, no-rules world when his half-brother draws him into the orbit of a corrupt, influential figure, where survival hinges on taking back what's his and protecting those he loves. Mohamed Emam, Mirna Gamil, Amr Abdel Galil.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Kidnapped from his wealthy family as a child, Yaman grows up on the streets, forming close bonds along the way. Years later, he's reunited with his biological family but struggles to adjust to a life of privilege he no longer remembers. Halit Özgür Sari, Yurdaer Okur, Dolunay Soysert, Bertan Asllani, Cagatay Tosun, Hilal Yildiz, Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.title: Bahar
programme.desc: After surviving a serious illness, Bahar, a devoted wife, finds herself facing a series of personal setbacks. With her marriage falling apart, she chooses to reclaim control of her life by returning to the medical career she once left behind. Demet Evgar, Mehmet Yilmaz Ak, Bugra Gülsoy, Ecem Özkaya, Füsun Demirel, Neslihan Yeşilyurt, Ayça Üzüm, Bugra Gulsoy, Ecem Ozkaya, Fusun Demirel, Elit Andac Cam, Demirhan Demircioglu, Neslihan Yesilyurt, Ayca Uzum.

programme.desc: Once a clean boxer, Hamza is pulled into a ruthless, no-rules world when his half-brother draws him into the orbit of a corrupt, influential figure, where survival hinges on taking back what's his and protecting those he loves. Mohamed Emam, Mirna Gamil, Amr Abdel Galil.

programme.title: Wild Heart
programme.desc: Kidnapped from his wealthy family as a child, Yaman grows up on the streets, forming close bonds along the way. Years later, he's reunited with his biological family but struggles to adjust to a life of privilege he no longer remembers. Halit Özgür Sari, Yurdaer Okur, Dolunay Soysert, Bertan Asllani, Cagatay Tosun, Hilal Yildiz, Halit Ozgur Sari, Simay Barlas.

programme.title: Bahar
programme.desc: After surviving a serious illness, Bahar, a devoted wife, finds herself facing a series of personal setbacks. With her marriage falling apart, she chooses to reclaim control of her life by returning to the medical career she once left behind. Demet Evgar, Mehmet Yilmaz Ak, Bugra Gülsoy, Ecem Özkaya, Füsun Demirel, Bugra Gulsoy, Ecem Ozkaya, Fusun Demirel, Elit Andac Cam, Demirhan Demircioglu, Neslihan Yesilyurt, Ayca Uzum.

programme.title: Retaliation
programme.desc: Following a group of people whose lives change for the worse upon exposing to a terrible event on an unexpectedly ominous day. Hossein Dashti, Abdullah Boushahri, Mahmoud Boushahri, Osama Al Mezeal, Areej Attar, Salma Salem, Shahd Elkhataab, Fatima Al-Busairi, Nour Al-Badri, Abdullah Boushehri, Mahmoud Boushehri.

programme.title: Poisoned Honey
programme.desc: In a peaceful family setting, Fouad's home brims with warmth and unity. However, when faced with adversity, tensions mount, testing the family's bonds and revealing their readiness to make sacrifices. Dhoul Feqaar Khedr, Seba Ibrahim, Bakr Khalid, Hend Nezar, Zohour Alaa, Fady Selim, Nada Emad Khalil, Zul Feqar Khedr, Saba Ibrahem.

programme.title: My Family Wins
programme.desc: In each episode, Jawad Al Shakarchi hosts two families competing to answer a series of general knowledge questions to win the grand prize of ten million Iraqi dinars. Jawad Al Shakraji, Fadi Hadad, Haider Nashi, Jawad Al Shakarchi, Fadi Haddad, Jawad Al Shakarji.

programme.title: Telling Jokes
programme.desc: Talk shows It displays many of the jokes and comedic situations that the hosts are exposed to and it also hosts a person who shares them their stories. Hedeir Al Shamy, Bakr Naif, Majid Yassin, Yasser Samy, Sabbah Al Helaly, Basem Al Boghdady.

programme.title: Sweet And Sour
programme.desc: After his past adventures, Saadoun returns to daily life, navigating hilarious mishaps with his quirky neighbors and eccentric coworkers, as comedy and chaos unfold around him. Ali Gaber, Ihssan Daadoush, Oussama Al-Sharqi, Hussein Al Najjar, Alaa Hussien, Ali Jaber, Khalil Ibrahim, Mohamed Hussein Abd El Rehim, Fawzya Hassan, Osama Al Sharqi, Ehsan Dadosh.

programme.title: Coma D
programme.desc: Iraqi characters discuss various social issues within the community in a funny and humorous way in an attempt to find solutions. Eiad Radhi, Alaa Hussien, Ihssan Daadoush, Ali Gaber, Aly Qasem Al Malak, Osama El Sharqawy, Hussein Al Najjar.

programme.title: Tonight With Dadosh
programme.desc: A TV show that's hosted by Ihssan Daadoush, who interviews a number of celebrities in a humorous way. Ehsan Dadosh.

programme.title: Taj
programme.desc: In the midst of Syria's French mandate, boxer Taj fights not just in the ring, but against accusations of treason from within the resistance, leading him on a gripping journey to prove his loyalty and innocence. Taim Hasan, Bassam Kousa, Dogana Essa, Farah Al Dbayyat, Nora Rahhal, Faia Younan, Samer Al Barqawi, Omar Abu Saada.

programme.title: Telling Jokes
programme.desc: Talk shows It displays many of the jokes and comedic situations that the hosts are exposed to and it also hosts a person who shares them their stories. Hedeir Al Shamy.

programme.title: About Some People
programme.desc: The train breaks down allowing the passengers to communicate and talk to each other about different topics and issues that concern them. Nasser Al-Qasabi, Majid Motrib Fawaz, Habib Al Habib, Remas Mansour, Elham Ali, Said Saleh, Mohamed Al Hamely, Khalaf Al Harbi, Majid Motrib Fawwaz, Habeeb Al Habeeb, Saied Saleh, Majid Mutrib Fawaz, Nasser Al Qasabi, Mohamed Al Hamly, Majed Mutreb Fawwaz.

programme.title: Coma D
programme.desc: Iraqi characters discuss various social issues within the community in a funny and humorous way in an attempt to find solutions. Eiad Rady, Alaa Hussien, Ihssan Daadoush, Osama El Sharqawy, Hussein Al Najjar, Ali Gaber, Aly Qasem Al Malak, Eiad Radhi.

programme.title: Tonight With Dadosh
programme.desc: A TV show that's hosted by Ihssan Daadoush, who interviews a number of celebrities in a humorous way. Ihssan Daadoush, Aliou Al Shayeb, Wael Al Sadat, Ehsan Dadosh.

programme.title: Sweet And Sour
programme.desc: After his past adventures, Saadoun returns to daily life, navigating hilarious mishaps with his quirky neighbors and eccentric coworkers, as comedy and chaos unfold around him. Ali Gaber, Ihssan Daadoush, Oussama Al-Sharqi, Hussein Al Najjar, Alaa Hussien, Khalil Ibrahim, Mohamed Hussein Abd El Rehim, Fawzya Hassan, Osama Al Sharqi, Ali Jaber, Ehsan Dadosh.

programme.title: My Family Wins
programme.desc: In each episode, Jawad Al Shakarchi hosts two families competing to answer a series of general knowledge questions to win the grand prize of ten million Iraqi dinars. Jawad Al Shakraji, Fadi Hadad, Haider Nashi, Jawad Al Shakarchi, Fadi Haddad, Jawad Al Shakarji.

programme.title: Telling Jokes
programme.desc: Talk shows It displays many of the jokes and comedic situations that the hosts are exposed to and it also hosts a person who shares them their stories. Hedeir Al Shamy, Bakr Naif, Majid Yassin, Yasser Samy, Sabbah Al Helaly, Basem Al Boghdady.

programme.title: Majid The Voice Of Love
programme.desc: Entertainment An unforgettable concert featuring Majid Al-Muhandis, where he delivers the most beautiful songs that touch the heart.

programme.title: The European Dream
programme.desc: While considering his options for leaving Egypt and immigrating to Europe, poor Hassan comes up with an odd idea when he reads an advertisement for a blind football team that will play its last matches in Poland. Mohamed Farraag, Nelly Karim.

programme.desc: S2026 E57 يطل الإعلامي الكبير عمرو أديب على جمهوره، حيث يقدم في كل حلقة فقرات سياسية واجتماعية واقتصادية وفنية، ويقوم بتحليل الأحداث اليومية بأسلوب مبسط ومسلي.
programme.title: الحكاية مع عمرو أديب موس

programme.desc: S2 E20 يمكث نعمان في منزل راضية وكمال بعد تركه منزل منى، فيما تواجه سعاد ناصر بشأن تغير تصرفاته وكذبه المستمر.
programme.title: عائلة الحاج نعمان موس

programme.desc: S1 E20 تعتدي والدة خالد على نشوى بالضرب ويحدث ما لم يكن في الحسبان، بينما يتقدم مدير ندى بطلب الزواج منها بعد نجاحها في العمل الجديد مبدياً إعجابه بها.
programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

programme.desc: S1 E19 تقوم طليقة خالد شاهيناز برفع قضية تعويض ضد شقيقاته بعد أن تسببن في إجهاضها، فيما يقوم أهلها بمساومة خالد على مليون جنيه، بينما تعرب شاهيناز عن استعدادها للتنازل لكن بشرط.
programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

programme.desc: S1 E20 تعتدي والدة خالد على نشوى بالضرب ويحدث ما لم يكن في الحسبان، بينما يتقدم مدير ندى بطلب الزواج منها بعد نجاحها في العمل الجديد مبدياً إعجابه بها.
programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

programme.desc: S1 E21 يكتشف خالد مؤامرة زوجته الثانية شاهيناز ويقوم بتطليقها ويطردها من المنزل، فيما يتعافى زوج مها الأول في السجن ويشفى من الإدمان.
programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

programme.desc: S1 E22 تقع مشادة بين خالد وشقيقاته ويخبرهن حول معرفته بخطتهن للتخلص منه مقابل الحصول على الأموال، فيما ما تزال ندى تفكر في زوجها الأول خالد وتتمنى أن تعود المياه إلى مجاريها.
programme.title: ولي العهد الموس

programme.desc: S1 E23 يحكم على خالد بالسجن ثلاثة أشهر وتذهب ندى لزيارته فيستغل ذلك ويحاول استعطافها ويطلب منها الرجوع إليه. أما والدة خالد، فتصاب بحالة نفسية سيئة بسبب ما حدث لابنها.

programme.title: One Last Sin
programme.desc: In a daring and treacherous quest, Hisham gambles everything to locate his vanished sister by going undercover in a ruthless drug cartel. However, the events that follow defy all anticipation, altering the course of everyone's lives forever. Samer Ismail, Ammar Shalaq.

programme.title: One Last Sin

programme.title: Athena
programme.desc: War correspondent Nadeen comes out of retirement after a horrific incident involving her sister. Determined to uncover the truth, she launches an investigation and discovers a connection to the dark web, where her sister will not be the last victim. Riham Haggag, Ahmed Magdy.

programme.title: Kaleerein
programme.desc: Meera is a free-spirited woman who rejects the pressure of traditional marriage. Her life changes when she meets Vivaan, a wealthy businessman searching for his family in India. Arjit Taneja, Aditi Sharma.

programme.desc: Amruta believes in love and marriage, while Virat avoids relationships because of past heartbreak. As they spend time together, they must deal with their differences and the growing challenges in their relationship. Sriti Jha, Arjit Taneja.

programme.title: Antim: The Final Truth
programme.desc: A severe struggle between a gangster, who was once a poor farmer's son, and a decisive police officer, who will do everything to arrest him. Salman Khan, Aayush Sharma, Mahima Makwana, Mahesh Manjrekar, Upendra Limaye, Mahesh Manjrekar, Mahesh Manjrekar, Siddharth Salvi.
